coaching.title: Easy Recovery
coaching.message: Back-to-back 6-milers this week are solid base work. Keep today easy — your legs need time after the 26.8-mile effort on April 11. 30–45 min zone 2 max.

coaching.title: Fuel for adaptation
coaching.message: At 190 lbs targeting Julian Alps 50K in September, prioritize protein today (0.8g/lb = ~152g). Carb-load lightly for tomorrow if you have a quality workout planned.

coaching.title: Sleep is the workout
coaching.message: You're 147 days out from race day. This is base-building phase — sleep 8+ hours and avoid back-to-back hard days.

coaching.title: Trust the long run
coaching.message: 26.8 miles is real fitness. The Julian Alps course will test you but you've proven you can go long. Stay consistent and the fitness compounds.
